title: polystichum manmeiense
intro: Polystichum manmeiense is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum manmeiense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Polystichum manmeiense typically involve drying and processing the fern fronds to create teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
